\tzpentry{ID4533}{Opera Omnia Vol Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4533 introduces Opera Omnia Vol Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \EntanglementS = -\sum_k \left[ n_k \ln n_k + (1+n_k)\ln(1+n_k) \right] \end{equation}
